subtask1.query: Please read the query.md file in the workspace directory to understand the task requirements. The goal is to implement camera movement functionality in the Robocasa simulation environment, supporting setting different poses for the same camera at each timestep, in order to collect training data for next best view selection models in robot manipulation. Please work on the current main branch of Robocasa and provide a method for setting camera poses using absolute coordinates in the robot base frame within the Robomimic framework. After completing the task, save all output files in the current directory.
deliverables: Python example script (*.py) - A minimal portable solution that can be easily integrated into existing data collection pipelines
Functionality documentation (*.md) - A concise document describing the key interfaces needed to implement this feature
Camera trajectory video (*.mp4) - Continuous smooth camera trajectory movement in a kitchen scene (e.g., PnPCounterToSink), rendered offscreen as a human-readable video
